column1: # Title: Emission factors (EFs) for carbon capture and storage (CCS) electric generation technologies
# Source: Derived from Cost and Performance Baseline for Fossil Energy Plants Volume 1 Bituminous Coal and Natural Gas and Electricity (NETL Report October 2022)
# Description: Global emission factors for electric generation technologies with CCS. NSPS must start in future model periods.
